title: M3 — Paper broker + feed + execution types
source: hackathon-pm M0 bootstrap 2026-05-28; roadmap in plan eres-un-product-manager-bubbly-floyd.md
why: The abstract Broker + PaperBroker stub + ReplayFeed let the whole live loop be developed and tested with zero external dependency, and are the substrate for the parity test.
value_rationale: Critical path to live paper-trading for the AI Engine Quantitative Hack; H = directly gates competition participation.
scope: execution/broker.py: Broker ABC; execution/feed.py: PriceFeed ABC + ReplayFeed + MT5Feed skeleton
execution/paper_broker.py: slippage/spread fills, position/PnL/margin tracking, SL/TP mark-to-market

history.reason: Delivered via the survival book: execution/types.py + broker.py (Broker ABC) + paper_broker.py built & tested. Shape differs from the original spec (history pulled by the broker get_history instead of a separate feed.py/ReplayFeed), but the substrate (abstract Broker + offline PaperBroker as the parity substrate) is in place.
@ chore(backlog): reconcile M1-M7 execution epic with the survival-book reality
chore(backlog): reconcile M1-M7 execution epic with the survival-book reality
